name: Sigma Lens 20mm f1.4 DG HSM (A) for Sony E Black
description: ruly wide and truly fast, the Sony E mount 20mm f/1.4 DG HSM Lens is a member of the venerable Art series of Global Vision lenses from Sigma and pairs a sophisticated optical design with a robust physical construction.

features.Key Features: SA Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/1.4 to f/16 | Two FLD Elements and Five SLD Elements | Two Aspherical Elements | Super Multi-Layer Coating | Hyper Sonic AF Motor, Manual Override | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | TSC Material, Brass Bayonet Mount | Built-In Petal-Shaped Lens Hood | Compatible with Sigma USB Dock
features.What’s In The Box: Sigma 20mm f/1.4 DG HSM Art Lens for SONY | LC907-01 Cover Lens Cap | Rear Cap LCR II for Canon EF Mount Lenses
